name: Sarah
attributes: 32-year-old first-time expectant mother, currently in her second trimester. She works as a marketing manager. Seeks reassurance that her feelings and experiences are normal and craves reliable, up-to-date information.

name: Emma
attributes: 35 years old. Senior Software Engineer. First trimester. Highly ambitious, concerned about career impact. Seeks strategies to balance career advancement with impending motherhood.

name: Sophia
attributes: 22 years old. Part-time Barista and College Student. Third trimester. Unplanned pregnancy. Worried about finishing her education while caring for a newborn.

name: Mei
attributes: 40 years old. Stay-at-home mom. Second trimester with twins. Pregnancy was achieved through IVF after secondary infertility. Concerned about high-risk pregnancy due to age and multiples.

name: Fatima
attributes: Faces the language barrier as a fundamental challenge. Experiences a cultural disconnect and the feeling of 'otherness'. Struggles with systemic challenges and limited resources.
